news.title: Less water, same taste: New approach helps growers produce sweet corn more efficiently
news.summary_en: University of Missouri researchers find farmers can cut back on water without losing crop quality.

news.title: Mizzou veterinarian helps decode animal health
news.summary_en: Lauren Delaney serves as the bridge between veterinarians and the expertise of Mizzou’s Veterinary Medical Diagnostic Laboratory, helping solve complex cases and protect animal health across Missouri and beyond.

news.title: Meet a Mizzou Law student ambassador
news.summary_en: As a law school ambassador, Elly Lang DeVeney helps incoming students build connections, find community and feel at home.

news.title: Office spaces, collections put professors’ personalities on display
news.summary_en: From children’s books to vintage cameras, personal and professional items reveal the people who bring the University of Missouri to life.

news.title: Celebrate Your Semester offers activities, food and friends
news.summary_en: End-of-year event designed to give Tigers a break before finals week.
